title: feed.rs: no SSRF guard on enclosure media URLs
description: In src/feed.rs poll_feed, media enclosure URLs from the parsed feed are passed directly to crate::media::process_remote without any hostname check. Feed content is attacker-influenced: an RSS/Atom feed can include enclosure URLs pointing to http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/ or any other internal service. process_remote itself has no SSRF guard (separate issue broadside-ftef.2). This issue tracks the feed-specific call site: even after process_remote gains an SSRF guard, it's worth noting this is an additional trust boundary — feed URLs must be treated as untrusted.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
